title: Luna Memory Index Summary Record
description: One compact summary per indexed source file. Phase 5D foundation; not yet wired into runtime services. Runtime artifacts memory/luna_memory_summaries.jsonl, memory/luna_memory_index.json, memory/luna_fast_recall.sqlite, and memory/luna_memory_index_build_report.json are all gitignored and regenerable.

schema_version.description: Bump only on backwards-incompatible record-shape changes.

source_path.description: Project-relative POSIX path of the indexed source file.

source_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the entire source file at index time. Empty when unavailable.

source_modified_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 mtime of the source. Empty when unavailable.

date_range.description: Earliest and latest ISO-8601-ish timestamp scanned in the source. Either may be empty.

tags.description: Coarse tags inferred from content (worker, aider, guardian, phase3, ...).

summary.description: Compact paragraph; whitespace-collapsed; clipped near 1200 chars by default.

record_count.description: Number of input rows / lines summarized for this record.

corrupt_count.description: JSONL rows that failed to parse and were skipped.

line_refs.description: Rough source line-range pointers so callers can drill in.

created_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp this record was produced.
